note: Packages are non-interchangeable. Packages may be purchased on the SHY app, our scheduling software, or in the studio.
rentalNote: Mat / towel rentals available in the studio: $3 each or both for $5. Please bring cash for purchases under $10.

packages.name: Drop In
packages.description: Single session. Good for 6 months if you can't make class.

packages.name: 5 Classes
packages.description: $13/class — save by purchasing 5 classes. Expires in 6 months.

packages.name: 10 Classes
packages.description: $11/class — save more with 10 classes. Expires in 6 months.

packages.name: 20 Classes
packages.description: $10/class — save the most with 20 classes. Expires in 6 months.

unlimited.name: 1 Month Unlimited
unlimited.description: Unlimited classes for 1 month. No commitments.

unlimited.name: 3 Month Unlimited
unlimited.description: Must sign up for auto-withdrawal. Not offered online — purchase in studio.

unlimited.name: Monthly Unlimited
unlimited.description: 6 month minimum commitment. Cancel anytime after 6 months. Purchase in studio.

unlimited.name: Partners Unlimited
unlimited.description: Sign up as a couple — second person gets 50% off! Same terms as monthly unlimited.

specials.name: Locals Intro Special
specials.description: 20 days of unlimited yoga! For new local students to take advantage of all our offerings. May be purchased one time.

specials.name: Limited Monthly
specials.description: Our best deal ever! 8 classes/month with auto-withdrawal. 3 month minimum. Perfect for people who travel or practice twice/week. Purchase in studio.

specials.name: Out-of-Towner
specials.description: For out-of-town visitors — unlimited classes for up to 1 week. Expires in 7 days. Purchase online or in studio.

discounts.name: Military Members
discounts.description: Thank you for your service. Discounted packages available in studio.

discounts.name: Students
discounts.description: Valid student ID required. Discounted packages available in studio.

discounts.name: Seniors (60+)
discounts.description: Age is just a number. Discounted packages available in studio.
